zh.lifeSummary: Osmund de Stuteville於大約1101年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁伯頓 阿格尼斯。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1172年之前在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁可廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Osmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 19th-century revival of an Old English personal name composed of ōs ‘god’ + mund ‘protector’. The name was also in use among the Normans and was borne by an 11th-century saint who was appointed to the see of Salisbury by William the Conqueror. As a modern given name it may be in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this name.

en.lifeSummary: Osmund de Stuteville was born about 1101, in Burton Agnes, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son. He died before 1172, in Cottingham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

ja.Cottingham, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングコッティンガム
ja.Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングブルトン アグネス
ja.lifeSummary: Osmund de Stutevilleは約1101年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングブルトン アグネスで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1172年以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングコッティンガムで死去した。

ko.Cottingham, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 컷잉함
ko.Burton Agnes, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 버턴 애그니스
ko.lifeSummary: Osmund de Stuteville(은)는 대략 1101년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 버턴 애그니스에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1172년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 컷잉함에서 사망했다.
